name: agent-bridge-local
description: Local marketplace for the agent-bridge plugin — a bidirectional agent bridge exposing gemini_agent and claude_agent as MCP tools, plus delegation and cross-model code-review skills.

plugins.name: agent-bridge
plugins.description: Bidirectional agent bridge as an MCP server: exposes `gemini_agent` (spawn a Gemini agent via the Antigravity `agy` CLI) and `claude_agent` (spawn a Claude agent via the `claude` CLI), plus skills for delegating to Gemini and for running cross-model code reviews.
